title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: This was very helpful! Thank you so much I plan to attend MTSU Fall of 2020, and you’re like the only student on YouTube that gives good information about the school.
author: @trinadecartier

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: this is an amazing video, I wish I subscribed sooner. I am currently a freshman at MTSU, and everything you said about the school is so true!! You seem like an awesome person. Thank you for making these videos.
author: @hopeurban7169

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: MTSU is the college i want to attend in the next year or so. Thanks for making these videos it helps me a lot.
author: @wyattray13

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: I love this so much. I didn't even know that you go there, I am from wi and have looked at going here. These videos are very helpful for me to decided if i want to go here. Thank you!
author: @lydia2365

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: Girl! Preach about McAllies! I'm also an MTSU YouTuber. My roommates and I have been watching your videos. Love your content! Keep it up fam!
author: @SuperheroWannabe

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: Hey, after finding your channel really cool for advice from the student perspective I thought I'd share it as part of one of my blog posts this week (that's also student related, granted from a postgrad's perspective) - hope that's cool :)
author: @mikejamesporter

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: I gotta say, hearing this stuff about MTSU is good to me 👍 I'm a Senior in high school right now and I'm planning to go to MTSU next year so hopefully I benefit from my experience there all the 4 years I go especially my Freshman year
author: @AKthirst

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body:
Really thanks your viedo, it's helpful.
I'm a GXU student and I will exchange to MTSU.
McPhee had been our capmus and given a lecture about MTSU, that's awesome, can't wait to be there!
author: @insightaha6549

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body:
Everyone at the orientation were talking about the freshman maze building. Is it really as confusing as people say it is?
Plus your videos help a lot keep making them:)
author: @jojem784

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: I did want to say that as far as the shootings on student Quarters go. They have beefed up security presence on all SQ campuses. And as far as I know not every Student Quarters complex has had shootings there are 3 different complexes that are all owned by Student Quarters.
author: @SuperheroWannabe

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: I'm going to MTSU this Fall. But I'm moving in early because I'll be one of the "DA's" and I had NO IDEA HOW IMPORTANT OUR ID CARD's were! They just gave them to us and didn't really say much about it. You literally made me go check in my wallet to see if my ID card was still in there. It is. But I'm highly disappointed because it looks like a mugshot. LOL. 😭
author: @princ3ssMusicifiy

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: How was the social atmosphere in Beasley? I'm living in Corlew right now and it feels exactly like a hotel.... impossible to meet anybody! I want to live on campus next year and I was wondering if any other options are more social.
author: @baileyjones1642

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: Since you said a lot of people leave on the weekends, do weekends get a little bit boring for those who live on campus?
author: @baileyjones1642

title: What You Need to Know About MTSU
body: My sat is on March 10th but is 2.54 GPA good enough?  If not then I have to do really well on the test then.
author: @crockerakahops90sjumpmantexas

title: MTSU Virtual Campus Tour
body: This is such a good video! I personally found it very helpful, I “virtually” discovered so many cool things! Looking forward to joining this fall 2022 ☺️
author: @aliaalsadon1102

title: A Day in the Life of a Freshman Engineering Student
body: I remember 3rd semester calculus introduced work for non-constant forces using integrals. I'd be in trouble if the planes weren't frictionless.
author: @michaeln.2383

title: A Day in the Life of a Freshman Engineering Student
body: Hey! I have finished to follow your day in this video. You made a comfortable video for everyone. Just keep going... By the way, your voice is so sweet and smooth sometimes it's funny...hihi:)
author: @quynhphamchannel6135

title: A Day in the Life of a Freshman Engineering Student
body:
Wowwwww, you have no idea how nostalgic I felt watching this video. I lived in Murfreesboro until I was about 9, then moved away, and haven't been back since. Seeing the campus, both the old and the new, really struck something in me. Thanks for this video. Btw, did you go to high school around the area?

Cheers, from a fellow college student
author: @peterluo8591

title: Day in the Life of a Film/Journalism Major // College Day in my Life Vlog
body: Oh my goodness, I would loooove to do film someday!!:) It would be so cool! I'm in college as a marketing major right now though ☺️
author: @CalebFitz

title: Day in the Life of a Film/Journalism Major // College Day in my Life Vlog
body: HI! I am so glad I found your channel! I just started my channel on my college life at MIT and was wondering if you have any tips in starting a channel
author: @AbsolutelyAthena

title: Day in the Life of a Film/Journalism Major // College Day in my Life Vlog
body: I have a question. Did you get into the top 50 to start taking higher up classes. If you did can you tell me how I can start off early making sure I can be in the top 50 starting my junior year?
author: @Angelslife46

title: Lyon Hall Full Dorm Tour (MTSU)
body: This was very helpful! I have been concerned about the bathroom situation, but now that I've seen the stales, I feel much better about dorm life.
author: @tigersaccount5345

title: Lyon Hall Full Dorm Tour (MTSU)
body: What happened to the sink?  I was in Lyon Hall in the 80’s and we had a sink between 2 closets.
author: @tammygibson5293
